paragraphs.translation: (1) For Ninlil , the lady of the gods , Iddin-Dagan , the powerful king , fashioned a composite copper statue , set it up before her , and dedicated it to her for his well-being .

(6) Whoever gives order to perform a misdeed against this ( statue ) , ... my handiwork , erases this inscription and writes his own name there , or makes another man raise his hand against it on account of this curse , may Nanna , my master , Ninlil , my lady , and Dagan , my personal god , curse him !
